history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person with curly dark hair sits in a metal chair on a balcony or rooftop at dusk. They are wearing a black t-shirt with white text that appears to read "WIGGLE" and black shorts. The person is looking away from the camera, with their right arm resting on their lap and their left hand touching their hair. They are wearing a watch on their left wrist and a ring on their left index finger. The background shows a clear, deep blue twilight sky with some silhouetted trees and houses in the distance. The lighting is dim, with a hint of warm light coming from a wooden structure on the right side of the frame. The overall mood is calm and contemplative, with a touch of mystery due to the person's obscured face. The color palette is dominated by deep blues and blacks, with accents of warm wood tones and the metallic sheen of the chair.
